debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
l : List (List α)
l1 : List α
idx idx1 : ℕ
hidx : idx < l.length
hidx1 : idx1 < l1.length
⊢ ∃ idx',
    (l.set idx (l1.eraseIdx idx1)).flatten = (l.set idx l1).flatten.eraseIdx ↑idx' ∧
      l1[idx1] = (l.set idx l1).flatten[idx']

failed_attempts:
induction l generalizing idx with
      | nil => contradiction
      | cons hd tl IH =>
        cases idx with
        | zero =>
          simp only [List.set_cons_zero, List.flatten_cons]
          refine ⟨⟨idx1, Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le hidx1 (List.length_append _ _ ▸ Nat.le_add_right _ _)⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
          · rw [List.eraseIdx_append_left hidx1]
          · rw [List.getElem_append_left hidx1]
        | succ idx =>
          simp only [List.length_cons, Nat.succ_lt_succ_iff] at hidx
          obtain ⟨idx_k, h_eq, h_val⟩ := IH (hidx := hidx)
          simp only [List.set_cons_succ, List.flatten_cons]
          refine ⟨⟨hd.length + idx_k, List.length_append _ _ ▸ Nat.add_lt_add_left idx_k.isLt _⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
          · rw [List.eraseIdx_append_right (Nat.le_add_right _ _)]
            simp [h_eq]
          · rw [List.getElem_append_right (Nat.le_add_right _ _)]
            simp [h_val]

induction l generalizing idx with
      | nil => contradiction
      | cons hd tl ih =>
        cases idx with
        | zero =>
          simp only [List.set, List.flatten, List.length_append]
          exists ⟨idx1, Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le hidx1 (Nat.le_add_right _ _)⟩
          constructor
          · apply List.eraseIdx_append_of_lt hidx1
          · apply List.getElem_append_left hidx1
        | succ n =>
          simp only [List.length_cons, Nat.add_lt_add_iff_right] at hidx
          obtain ⟨idx', heq, hval⟩ := ih (idx := n) (hidx := hidx)
          simp only [List.set, List.flatten, List.length_append]
          exists ⟨hd.length + idx', Nat.add_lt_add_left idx'.2 _⟩
          constructor
          · rw [List.eraseIdx_append_of_ge (Nat.le_add_right _ _)]
            simp [heq]
          · rw [List.getElem_append_right (Nat.le_add_right _ _)]
            simp [hval]

induction l generalizing idx with
        | nil => contradiction
        | cons hd tl IH =>
          cases idx with
          | zero =>
            simp
            refine ⟨⟨idx1, Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le hidx1 (Nat.le_add_right _ _)⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
            · rw [List.eraseIdx_append_of_lt_length hidx1]
            · rw [List.getElem_append_left hidx1]
          | succ n =>
            simp
            obtain ⟨k, hk1, hk2⟩ := IH (hidx := Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ hidx)
            refine ⟨⟨hd.length + k, Nat.add_lt_add_left k.isLt _⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
            · rw [List.eraseIdx_append_of_ge_length (Nat.le_add_right _ _)]; simp [hk1]
            · rw [List.getElem_append_right (Nat.le_add_right _ _)]; simp [hk2]

induction l generalizing idx with
      | nil => contradiction
      | cons hd tl IH =>
        cases idx with
        | zero =>
          simp only [List.set_cons_zero, List.flatten_cons]
          exists ⟨idx1, by simp; apply Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le hidx1 (Nat.le_add_right _ _)⟩
          constructor
          · apply List.eraseIdx_append_of_lt hidx1
          · rw [List.getElem_append_left]; exact hidx1
        | succ n =>
          simp only [List.length_cons, Nat.succ_eq_add_one, Nat.add_lt_add_iff_right] at hidx
          obtain ⟨idx', hflatten, hget⟩ := IH (hidx := hidx)
          exists ⟨hd.length + idx', Nat.add_lt_add_left idx'.2 _⟩
          simp only [List.set_cons_succ, List.flatten_cons]
          constructor
          · rw [List.eraseIdx_append_right, hflatten]
          · rw [List.getElem_append_right]

            · simp; apply Nat.le_add_right

induction l generalizing idx with
      | nil => contradiction
      | cons hd tl IH =>
        cases idx with
        | zero =>
          simp
          have h : idx1 < (l1 ++ tl.flatten).length := by
            rw [List.length_append]
            exact Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le hidx1 (Nat.le_add_right _ _)
          refine ⟨⟨idx1, h⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
          · rw [List.eraseIdx_append_of_lt_length hidx1]
          · rw [List.getElem_append_left hidx1]
        | succ idx =>
          simp at hidx
          obtain ⟨idx', h_eq, h_get⟩ := IH (hidx := hidx)
          simp
          let new_idx := hd.length + idx'.1
          have h : new_idx < (hd ++ (tl.set idx l1).flatten).length := by
            rw [List.length_append]
            exact Nat.add_lt_add_left idx'.2 _
          refine ⟨⟨new_idx, h⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
          · rw [List.eraseIdx_append_of_ge_length (Nat.le_add_right _ _)]
            simp [new_idx, h_eq]
          · rw [List.getElem_append_right (Nat.le_add_right _ _)]
            simp [new_idx, ← h_get]

induction l generalizing idx with
      | nil => simp at hidx
      | cons hd tl IH =>
        cases idx with
        | zero =>

          exists ⟨new_idx, hnew⟩

          · rw [List.eraseIdx_append_of_ge_length (Nat.le_add_right _ _)]; simp [new_idx, heq]
          · rw [List.getElem_append_right (Nat.le_add_right _ _)]; simp [new_idx, hval]

induction l generalizing idx with

      | cons hd tl HR =>
        match idx with
        | 0 =>
          simp only [List.set, List.flatten_cons]
          have hlen : idx1 < (l1 ++ tl.flatten).length := by
            rw [List.length_append]

          refine ⟨⟨idx1, hlen⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
          · rw [List.eraseIdx_append_of_lt _ hidx1]
          · rw [List.getElem_append_left hidx1]
        | succ n =>
          simp only [List.length_cons, Nat.succ_lt_succ_iff] at hidx
          obtain ⟨idx', H1, H2⟩ := HR (hidx := hidx)
          let k := hd.length + idx'.1
          have hk : k < (hd ++ (tl.set n l1).flatten).length := by
            rw [List.length_append]
            exact Nat.add_lt_add_left idx'.2 _
          refine ⟨⟨k, hk⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
          · simp only [List.set, List.flatten_cons]
            rw [H1, List.eraseIdx_append_right (Nat.le_add_right _ _)]
            simp [k]
          · simp only [List.set, List.flatten_cons]
            rw [List.getElem_append_right (Nat.le_add_right _ _)]
            simp [k, H2]

            constructor
            · induction l1 generalizing idx1 with

            · induction l1 generalizing idx1 with

induction idx generalizing l with
      | zero =>
        match l with
        | [] => contradiction
        | hd :: tl =>
          simp
          exists ⟨idx1, by
            rw [List.length_append]
            apply Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le hidx1 (Nat.le_add_right _ _)⟩
          constructor
          · rw [List.eraseIdx_append_of_lt_length hidx1]
          · rw [List.getElem_append_left hidx1]
      | succ n ih =>
        match l with
        | [] => contradiction
        | hd :: tl =>
          simp at hidx
          obtain ⟨k, hk1, hk2⟩ := ih (hidx := Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ hidx)
          simp
          let idx' := hd.length + k
          have hidx' : idx' < (hd ++ (tl.set n l1).flatten).length := by
            rw [List.length_append]; apply Nat.add_lt_add_left k.isLt
          exists ⟨idx', hidx'⟩
          constructor
          · rw [hk1, List.eraseIdx_append_of_ge_length]
            · simp [idx']
            · simp [idx']
          · rw [List.getElem_append_right]
            · simp [idx']; exact hk2
            · simp [idx']

induction l generalizing idx with
      | nil => contradiction
      | cons hd tl IH =>
        cases idx with
        | zero =>
          simp
          refine ⟨⟨idx1, Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le hidx1 (Nat.le_add_right _ _)⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
          · rw [List.eraseIdx_append_of_lt hidx1]
          · rw [List.getElem_append_left hidx1]
        | succ idx =>
          simp at hidx
          obtain ⟨idx', heq, hval⟩ := IH (hidx := hidx)
          simp
          refine ⟨⟨hd.length + idx', Nat.add_lt_add_left idx'.2 _⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
          · rw [List.eraseIdx_append_of_ge (Nat.le_add_right _ _)]
            simp [heq]
          · rw [List.getElem_append_right (Nat.le_add_right _ _)]
            simp [hval]

induction l generalizing idx with
    | nil => contradiction
    | cons hd tl IH =>
      cases idx with
      | zero =>
        simp
        exists ⟨idx1, by rw [List.length_append]; exact Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le hidx1 (Nat.le_add_right _ _)⟩
        constructor
        · induction l1 generalizing idx1 with
          | nil => contradiction
          | cons x xs ih =>
            cases idx1 with
            | zero => simp
            | succ n => simp; apply ih; exact Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ hidx1
        · apply List.getElem_append_left hidx1
      | succ idx' =>
        simp at hidx
        obtain ⟨⟨k, hk_bound⟩, hk1, hk2⟩ := IH (hidx := hidx)
        simp
        exists ⟨hd.length + k, by rw [List.length_append]; exact Nat.add_lt_add_left hk_bound _⟩
        constructor
        · induction hd with
          | nil => simp; exact hk1
          | cons x xs ih => simp; exact ih
        · rw [List.getElem_append_right (Nat.le_add_right _ _)]; simp; exact hk2

induction l generalizing idx with
        | nil => contradiction
        | cons hd tl IH =>
          cases idx with
          | zero =>
            simp
            exists ⟨idx1, by
              rw [List.length_append]
              exact Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le hidx1 (Nat.le_add_right _ _)⟩
            constructor
            · rw [List.eraseIdx_append_of_lt_length hidx1]
            · rw [List.getElem_append_left hidx1]
          | succ n =>
            simp at hidx
            obtain ⟨idx', heq, hget⟩ := IH (hidx := Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ hidx)
            exists ⟨hd.length + idx', by simp; exact Nat.add_lt_add_left idx'.2 _⟩
            simp
            constructor
            · rw [List.eraseIdx_append_of_ge_length (Nat.le_add_right _ _)]
              simp; exact heq
            · rw [List.getElem_append_right (Nat.le_add_right _ _)]
              simp; exact hget

induction l generalizing idx with
      | nil => contradiction
      | cons hd tl IH =>
        cases idx with
        | zero =>
          simp only [List.set_cons_zero, List.flatten_cons]
          exists ⟨idx1, Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le hidx1 (Nat.le_add_right _ _)⟩
          simp [List.eraseIdx_append_of_lt hidx1, List.getElem_append_left hidx1]
        | succ n =>
          simp only [List.set_cons_succ, List.flatten_cons]
          obtain ⟨idx', h_eq, h_val⟩ := IH (hidx := Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ hidx)
          exists ⟨hd.length + idx', Nat.add_lt_add_left idx'.isLt _⟩
          simp [List.eraseIdx_append_of_ge, List.getElem_append_right, h_eq, h_val, Nat.le_add_right]

induction l generalizing idx with
      | nil => simp at hidx
      | cons hd tl ih =>
        cases idx with
        | zero =>
          simp
          exact ⟨⟨idx1, Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le hidx1 (Nat.le_add_right _ _)⟩, by
            simp [List.eraseIdx_append_of_lt_length hidx1, List.getElem_append_left hidx1]⟩
        | succ n =>
          simp at hidx ⊢
          obtain ⟨k, hk1, hk2⟩ := ih (hidx := Nat.lt_of_succ_lt_succ hidx)
          exact ⟨⟨hd.length + k, Nat.add_lt_add_left k.2 _⟩, by
            simp [List.eraseIdx_append_right (Nat.le_add_right _ _),
              List.getElem_append_right (Nat.le_add_right _ _), hk1, hk2]⟩

induction idx generalizing l with
    | zero =>
      cases l with
      | nil => contradiction
      | cons hd tl =>
        simp only [List.set_cons_zero, List.flatten_cons]
        exists ⟨idx1, Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le hidx1 (Nat.le_add_right _ _)⟩
        simp [List.eraseIdx_append_of_lt hidx1, List.getElem_append_left hidx1]
    | succ idx IH =>
      cases l with
      | nil => contradiction
      | cons hd tl =>
        simp only [List.length_cons, Nat.succ_lt_succ_iff] at hidx
        obtain ⟨idx', heq, hval⟩ := IH (l := tl) (hidx := hidx)
        simp only [List.set_cons_succ, List.flatten_cons]
        exists ⟨hd.length + idx', by rw [List.length_append]; exact Nat.add_lt_add_left idx'.2 _⟩
        rw [List.eraseIdx_append_right, List.getElem_append_right (Nat.le_add_right _ _)]
        simp [heq, hval]

induction l generalizing idx with
      | nil => contradiction
      | cons hd tl IH =>
        cases idx with
        | zero =>
          simp
          exists ⟨idx1, by simp; apply Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le hidx1; apply Nat.le_add_right⟩
          rw [List.eraseIdx_append_of_lt _ hidx1, List.getElem_append_left _ _ hidx1]
          exact ⟨rfl, rfl⟩
        | succ n =>
          simp at hidx
          obtain ⟨idx', heq, hval⟩ := IH (hidx := hidx)
          exists ⟨hd.length + idx', by simp; apply Nat.add_lt_add_left idx'.2⟩
          simp
          rw [List.eraseIdx_append_right _ _ (Nat.le_add_right _ _), List.getElem_append_right _ _ (Nat.le_add_right _ _)]
          simp [heq, hval]

induction idx generalizing l with
    | zero =>
      match l with
      | [] => contradiction
      | hd :: tl =>
        simp only [List.set, List.flatten_cons]
        exists ⟨idx1, by simp; apply Nat.lt_of_lt_of_le hidx1; apply Nat.le_add_right⟩
        constructor
        · induction l1 generalizing idx1 with
          | nil => contradiction
          | cons x xs ih =>
            cases idx1
            · simp [List.eraseIdx]
            · simp [List.eraseIdx, List.cons_append]; apply ih; simp at hidx1; exact hidx1
        · rw [List.getElem_append]; simp [hidx1]
    | succ n ih =>
      match l with
      | [] => contradiction
      | hd :: tl =>
        simp only [List.length_cons, Nat.succ_lt_succ_iff] at hidx
        obtain ⟨idx_tail, h_eq, h_elt⟩ := ih (hidx := hidx)
        simp only [List.set, List.flatten_cons]
        exists ⟨hd.length + idx_tail.1, by simp; apply Nat.add_lt_add_left idx_tail.2⟩
        constructor
        · rw [h_eq]; clear h_eq h_elt ih
          induction hd with
          | nil => simp
          | cons x xs ih => simp [List.eraseIdx, ih]
        · rw [h_elt, List.getElem_append_right]
          · simp
          · apply Nat.le_add_right
